methodology.UserFees: Trading and liquidity fees paid by users
methodology.Fees: Trading and liquidity fees from Curve pools (typically 0.01%-0.04%)
methodology.Revenue: Fees distributed to veCRV holders and protocol treasury
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Fees allocated to the protocol treasury
methodology.HoldersRevenue: Fees distributed to veCRV governance token holders
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Fees distributed to liquidity providers

methodology.Fees: Include borrow interest, flashloan fee, liquidation fee and penalty paid by borrowers.
methodology.Revenue: Amount of fees go to Aave treasury.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Amount of fees go to Aave treasury.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Amount of fees distributed to suppliers.

Fees.Borrow Interest: All interest paid by borrowers from all markets (excluding GHO).
Fees.Borrow Interest GHO: All interest paid by borrowers from GHO only.
Fees.Liquidation Fees: Fees from liquidation penalty and bonuses.
Fees.Flashloan Fees: Flashloan fees paid by flashloan borrowers and executors.

Revenue.Borrow Interest: A portion of interest paid by borrowers from all markets (excluding GHO).
Revenue.Borrow Interest GHO: All 100% interest paid by GHO borrowers.
Revenue.Liquidation Fees: A portion of fees from liquidation penalty and bonuses.
Revenue.Flashloan Fees: A portion of fees paid by flashloan borrowers and executors.

SupplySideRevenue.Borrow Interest: Amount of interest distributed to lenders from all markets (excluding GHO).
SupplySideRevenue.Borrow Interest GHO: No supply side revenue for lenders on GHO market.
SupplySideRevenue.Liquidation Fees: Fees from liquidation penalty and bonuses are distributed to lenders.
SupplySideRevenue.Flashloan Fees: Flashloan fees paid by flashloan borrowers and executors are distributed to lenders.

ProtocolRevenue.Borrow Interest: Amount of interest distributed to lenders from all markets (excluding GHO) are collected by Aave treasury.
ProtocolRevenue.Borrow Interest GHO: All interest paid on GHO market are collected by Aave treasury.
ProtocolRevenue.Liquidation Fees: A portion of fees from liquidation penalty and bonuses are colected by Aave treasury.
ProtocolRevenue.Flashloan Fees: A portion of fees paid by flashloan borrowers and executors are collected by Aave treasury.

methodology.UserFees: Users pay a 0.3% fee on each trade
methodology.Fees: SushiSwap charges a flat 0.3% fee
methodology.Revenue: A 0.05% of each trade goes to treasury
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Treasury receives a share of the fees
methodology.HoldersRevenue: Share of swap fee goes to xSUSHI stakers.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Liquidity providers get 5/6 of all trades in their pools

methodology.UserFees: Users pay a dynamic fee based on market conditions
methodology.Fees: Kyberswap Classic collects a dynamic fee that increases with market volatility and decreases with stable market conditions

methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Treasury have no revenue
methodology.HoldersRevenue: Holders who stake and participate in the KyberDAO get their share of the fees designated for rewards, currently set at 10% of trading fees
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Liquidity providers earn 90% fees of trading routed through their pool and selected price range

methodology.Fees: All fees that are paid by users from withdrawal to relayers.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: All fees that are paid by users from withdrawal to relayers.
methodology.Revenue: No revenue.

methodology.Fees: Trading fees as reported by the tradeFee field in PositionChanged events. Futureswap is a leveraged derivatives protocol and does not emit explicit fee settlement events.
methodology.Revenue: All reported trade fees are treated as protocol revenue due to lack of on-chain fee distribution data.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Same as Revenue.
methodology.HoldersRevenue: Fees going to governance token holders
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: LPs revenue

methodology.UserFees: User pays 0.3% fees on each swap

methodology.Fees: total fees paid by users from Colony DEX activities.
methodology.Revenue: Revenue distributed to token stakers includes 100% from CLY staking and unstaking fees, 50% of CAI fees, 8% of early-stage activity fees (ceTokens), and 70% of Validator Program activity revenues. This distribution creates a strong APY for CLY stakers, incentivizing protocol staking and long-term involvement in Colony's protocol.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Revenue sources directly retained by the protocol include 50% from CAI fees (minting 0.20%, redemption 0.5%, and management 1%), 2% from early-stage platform activities (ceTokens distribution), 2% from USDC fundraised by a project, 16.66% from Colony DEX swap fees, and 30% from Validator Program activities. These funds support the protocol's ongoing development and operations.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: 83.33% of the fees collected from Colony DEX transactions are distributed to liquidity providers. Additionally, 10% of ceTokens are distributed to staked liquidity providers on Colony's DEX, incentivizing them to continue providing liquidity and supporting the exchange. Additional revenue can be generated through farm rewards based on specific marketing campaigns and incentive programs.
methodology.HoldersRevenue: Revenue distributed to token stakers includes 100% from CLY staking and unstaking fees, 50% of CAI fees, 8% of early-stage activity fees (ceTokens), and 70% of Validator Program activity revenues. This distribution creates a strong APY for CLY stakers, incentivizing protocol staking and long-term involvement in Colony's protocol.

Fees.Borrow Interest: All interest paid by borrowers from all markets (excluding GHO).

methodology.Fees: All fees (called «house edge» from 2.4% to 4% of the payout) comes from the player's bet. The fee has several allocations: Bank, Partner, Affiliate, Dividends, Treasury, and Team. The house edge on PvP games is from 3.5% to 7% allocated to Dividends, Host, Affiliate, Treasury and Team.

methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Total fees paid are collected by Bungee protocol.

methodology.Fees: Total yields from deposited assets in all curated vaults.
methodology.Revenue: Yields are collected by curators.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Yields are collected by curators.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Yields are distributed to vaults depositors/investors.

Fees.Assets Yields: Interest yields generated from deposited assets in all curated vaults, including both curator fees and depositor yields

Revenue.Assets Yields: Portion of interest yields retained by vault curators as management and performance fees

SupplySideRevenue.Assets Yields: Portion of interest yields distributed to vault depositors/investors after curator fees are deducted

methodology.Fees: Total yields from deposited assets in all curated vaults.
methodology.Revenue: Yields are collected by curators.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Yields are collected by curators.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Yields are distributed to vaults depositors/investors.

Fees.Assets Yields: Interest yields generated from deposited assets in all curated vaults, including both curator fees and depositor yields

Revenue.Assets Yields: Portion of interest yields retained by vault curators as management and performance fees

SupplySideRevenue.Assets Yields: Portion of interest yields distributed to vault depositors/investors after curator fees are deducted

methodology.Revenue: Yields are collected by curators.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Yields are collected by curators.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Yields are distributed to vaults depositors/investors.

methodology.Fees: Redeem fees + yield distribution
methodology.Revenue: 10% of the net profits generated by the protocol strategies and mint/redeem fees
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: 10% of the net profits generated by the protocol strategies and mint/redeem fees

Fees.Assets Yields: The net profits generated by the protocol strategies.
Fees.Mint/Redeem Fees: Users pay a 0.05% fee when redeeming avUSD.
Fees.Performance Fees: 10% of the net profits as performance fees.

methodology.Fees: The total fee incurred during bridging, including all transaction fees on both the source and destination chains.
methodology.Revenue: The protocol takes 0% cut of assets during bridging
methodology.HoldersRevenue: Token holders fees share

methodology.Fees: All fees paid by users for swap and bridge tokens via Haiku.
methodology.Revenue: Fees are distributed to Haiku.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Fees are distributed to Haiku.

methodology.Fees: Redeem fees + yield distribution
methodology.Revenue: 10% of the net profits generated by the protocol strategies and mint/redeem fees
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: 10% of the net profits generated by the protocol strategies and mint/redeem fees
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Yield distribution to avBTC holders

Fees.Assets Yields: The net profits generated by the protocol strategies.
Fees.Mint/Redeem Fees: Users pay a 0.05% fee when redeeming avBTC.
Fees.Performance Fees: 10% of the net profits as performance fees.

methodology.Fees: Fees paid by users for swaps.
methodology.Revenue: Revenue is calculated as the sum of routingFee for the old contract and the sum of protocolShare for the new contract.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Protocol Revenue is calculated as the sum of routing fees and protocol share.

methodology.Fees: All fees paid by users to use a particular Smithii tool.
methodology.Revenue: All fees are collected by smithii.io protocol.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Trading fees are collected by smithii.io protocol.

methodology.UserFees: All swap fees paid by traders.
methodology.Fees: All swap fees paid by traders.
methodology.Revenue: Portion of swap fees attributed to staked LPs, which are routed through the Gauge and distributed to veBLACK voters as bribes.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: No protocol revenue.
methodology.HoldersRevenue: Portion of swap fees attributed to staked LPs, which are routed through the Gauge and distributed to veBLACK voters as bribes.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Portion of swap fees paid out to unstaked LPs.

methodology.UserFees: All swap fees paid by users.
methodology.Fees: All swap fees paid by users.
methodology.Revenue: All swap fees are revenue.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Protocol makes no revenue.
methodology.HoldersRevenue: All revenue are distributed to veBlack holders.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: No fees distributed to LPs.

methodology.UserFees: Fees paid by users for swaps
methodology.Fees: Fees paid by users for swaps
methodology.Revenue: 10% Fees to Pangolin Protocol treasury, 10% to PNG stakers
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: 10% Fees to Pangolin Protocol treasury
methodology.HoldersRevenue: 10% Fees to PNG stakers
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: 80% Fees to liquidity providers

methodology.Fees: swap fees paid by users.
methodology.Revenue: Protocol share from swap fees
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Protocol share from swap fees
methodology.HoldersRevenue: No Holder Revenue
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Liquidity providers share fromswap fees

methodology.Fees: swap fees paid by users.
methodology.Revenue: protocol revenue is zero
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: protocol revenue is zero
methodology.HoldersRevenue: holders revenue is zero
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: 100% revenue goes to the liquidity providers

methodology.Fees: swap fees paid by users.
methodology.Revenue: Protocol share from swap fees
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Protocol share from swap fees
methodology.HoldersRevenue: No Holder Revenue
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Liquidity providers share fromswap fees

methodology.Fees: Fees paid by users while trading via Binance Alpha app.
methodology.UserFees: Fees paid by users while trading via Binance Alpha app.
methodology.Revenue: All fees are collected by Binance.

methodology.Fees: Total yields from deposited assets in all curated vaults.
methodology.Revenue: Yields are collected by curators.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Yields are collected by curators.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Yields are distributed to vaults depositors/investors.

methodology.UserFees: User pays fees on each swap.
methodology.Fees: Fees are collected from users on each swap.
methodology.Revenue: Revenue going to the protocol + Token holder Revenue.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Revenue going to the protocol.
methodology.HoldersRevenue: User fees are distributed among holders.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Fees distributed to LPs.

methodology.UserFees: User pays fees on each swap.
methodology.Fees: Fees are collected from users on each swap.
methodology.Revenue: Revenue going to the protocol + Token holder Revenue.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Revenue going to the protocol.
methodology.HoldersRevenue: User fees are distributed among holders.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Fees distributed to LPs (from gauged pools).

methodology.Fees: Gross network product delta recorded by each Unlock contract across supported chains.
methodology.Revenue: Unlock DAO keeps the protocol fee (1% of each key purchase/renewal).
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Equal to total revenue because Unlock DAO accrues the entire protocol fee.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Remaining 99% of the gross network product flows to individual lock creators.

methodology.Fees: Total 0.5% swap fee per trade. 50% goes to LPs, 50% to the protocol treasury.
methodology.Revenue: Protocol receives 0.25% of total swap volume as revenue.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Protocol treasury collects 50% of fees (0.25% of volume).
methodology.HoldersRevenue: Money going to governance token holders
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Liquidity providers earn the remaining 50% (0.25% of volume).
methodology.Volume: Total swap volume collected from PumpSpace V2 factory on Avalanche.

methodology.Fees: Total yield generated, including 15% protocol retention and 85% distributed to depositors.
methodology.Revenue: All fees are distributed between protocol, token holders, and depositors.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: 5% of protocol yield reserved for liquidity reinvestment, plus 0.2% exit fees.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: 85% of yield distributed to depositors (derived from 15% protocol retention rate).
methodology.HoldersRevenue: 10% of protocol yield used for CORAL token buyback and burn.

Fees.Token Buy Back: 10% of protocol yield distributed to CORAL token holders via buyback and burn
Fees.Protocol Fees: 5% of protocol yield reserved for liquidity reinvestment plus 0.2% withdrawal exit fees collected in USDT
Fees.Assets Yields: 85% of total yield distributed to depositors as supply-side revenue

Revenue.Token Buy Back: 10% of protocol yield distributed to CORAL token holders via buyback and burn
Revenue.Protocol Fees: 5% of protocol yield reserved for liquidity reinvestment plus 0.2% withdrawal exit fees collected in USDT

HoldersRevenue.Token Buy Back: 10% of protocol yield distributed to CORAL token holders via buyback and burn

ProtocolRevenue.Protocol Fees: 5% of protocol yield reserved for liquidity reinvestment plus 0.2% withdrawal exit fees collected in USDT

SupplySideRevenue.Assets Yields: 85% of total yield distributed to depositors as supply-side revenue

methodology.Fees: All received native coin is treated as revenue.
methodology.Revenue: All received native coin is treated as revenue.
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: All received fees are collected by protocol.

methodology.Fees: The yield generated from deposited assets
methodology.Revenue: The redemption fees. The protocol charges a management and performance fee, but the actual percentages are not disclosed
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: The yield generated from deposited assets are distributed to reUsd and reUSDe
methodology.UserFees: There's a 18 bps fee on redemptions

methodology.Fees: Mint and Publish NFT fees are paid by users
methodology.Revenue: platform fees charged from users
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: platform fees charged from users

methodology.Fees: Fees paid by users for actions on On-chain Check-in
methodology.Revenue: Protocol revenue, defined as the total amount of user fees collected by On-chain Check-in

methodology.Fees: SecondSwap facilitates trading of locked/vesting tokens. Trading fees paid by buyers and sellers on each spot purchase transaction.
methodology.Revenue: SecondSwap currently retains 100% of trading fees as protocol revenue.

Fees.Trading Fees: Trading fees paid by buyers and sellers on each spot purchase transaction.

methodology.Volume: Total trading volume from bonding curve buys and sells on the Printr protocol, tracked via on-chain TokenTrade events. Each trade's cost is denominated in the curve's base pair token (e.g. USDC, WETH, BNB).
methodology.Fees: Printr charges a 1% fee on all bonding curve swaps.
methodology.Revenue: 75% of trading fees: team (10%), protocol-controlled memecoin reserve (25%), and buyback (40%).
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: 35% of trading fees: 10% to the Printr team and 25% to the protocol-controlled memecoin reserve fund (allocated via community voting for liquidity, listings, and growth).
methodology.HoldersRevenue: 40% of trading fees are used for buybacks, benefiting token holders.
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: 25% of trading fees go to token creators.

Fees.Token Swap Fees: Printr charges a 1% fee on all bonding curve swaps.

Revenue.Protocol Fees: 10% of trading fees go to the Printr team.
Revenue.Token Buy Back: 40% of trading fees are used for buybacks, benefiting token holders.
Revenue.Memecoin Reserve: 25% of trading fees go to the protocol-controlled memecoin reserve fund (allocated via community voting for liquidity, listings, and growth).

ProtocolRevenue.Protocol Fees: 10% of trading fees go to the Printr team.
ProtocolRevenue.Memecoin Reserve: 25% of trading fees go to the protocol-controlled memecoin reserve fund (allocated via community voting for liquidity, listings, and growth).

HoldersRevenue.Token Buy Back: 40% of trading fees are used for buybacks, benefiting token holders.

SupplySideRevenue.Creator Fees: 25% of trading fees go to token creators.

methodology.UserFees: Users pay V3 swapFee() per swap.
methodology.Fees: V3 fees are computed on amountIn using each pool's swapFee() (pips where 1e6 = 100%).
methodology.Revenue: V3: protocol share is determined by MiningPoolFactory.defaultProtocolFee() (bps, currently 2000 = 20% of fees).
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Treasury share of fees. V3: defaultProtocolFee() share (currently 20% of fees).
methodology.HoldersRevenue: Money going to governance token holders
methodology.SupplySideRevenue: Liquidity providers' share of fees. V3: remaining share after protocol fee (currently 80% of fees).
methodology.Volume: DEX swap volume on PumpSpace (Trident V3) on Avalanche.

methodology.Fees: Transaction fees paid by users
methodology.Revenue: Amount of AVAX transaction fees that were burned
methodology.HoldersRevenue: Amount of AVAX transaction fees that were burned
